_title: USAF Repair Roof Bldg. 917 — CONSTRUCTION (FAR Part 36) — out-of-scope detection key
_suiteRole: OUT-OF-SCOPE DETECTION anchor. The engine's domain is discrete-document supply/repair/services; construction is the known structural-incompatibility class. This key asserts the engine DETECTS construction and HONEST-FAILS (OUT_OF_SCOPE) BEFORE any paid model call — never a verdict. Authored objectively from the complete source per Brain construction ruling 2026-06-26; supersedes the retired full_verdict key (authored against an incomplete 221KB source, sha 42c65df6…, which never saw the 459-page Specification).
grade_pass_iff: engine emits outcome==OUT_OF_SCOPE AND reason=='out_of_scope:construction' AND cites >=1 matched construction signal, BEFORE any paid model call (no charge)
grade_fail_subtypes: law_violation: any substantive verdict emitted (BID / BID_WITH_CAUTION / NO_BID / INELIGIBLE) on a construction package
under_fire_safe_backstop: honest-fail with a NON-construction reason (e.g. INCOMPLETE / NEEDS_HUMAN_REVIEW) — safe (no false verdict) but missed the construction class

construction_indicators._note: OBJECTIVE signals cited from the complete source — these are detection signals, NOT a verdict (Rule 64).

hard.cited_from: complete source — primary NAICS for the requirement
complete source — construction counterpart to SF-1449 (commercial)

boundary_corroborating.cited_from: complete source — 459-page Specification, multiple MasterFormat sections

construction_indicators.detector_tier_fired: hard (NAICS-23 and/or SF-1442 — either alone is sufficient)

supersedes.reason: partial source; reclassified full_verdict->oos_detection per construction honest-fail ruling 2026-06-26

adjudication.authoredBy: Code (objective signals only — no verdict, no judgment)
